[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A centered animated figure stands in a room while bold text “hmp.” appears at the bottom of the image.  

Main Subject:  
The main subject is an animated character with a white head covering or hat that has a decorative pattern along the top edge. The face area appears pale and framed by dark hair-like elements and a scarf or hood-like dark fabric. The character wears a long, dark red cloak or draped fabric extending down on both sides, with a lighter white section at the center of the torso featuring a diamond-like emblem. The character’s hands are held close to the body, and the overall posture is upright and facing forward.  

Setting:  
The background shows an indoor scene with a large brown panel or door-like surface on the left, a small green ball or sphere on the floor near the left side, and a yellow-orange sofa or cushioned seat on the right. The floor is smooth and light-colored. The lighting looks soft and even, with no visible weather cues since it appears indoors. The camera view is straight-on, with the character centered in the composition.  

Visual Details:  
Colors include brown and tan in the background and floor, a bright yellow-orange couch on the right, a dark red cloak, white and pale tones on the character’s central outfit, and a small green object on the left side of the floor. The text “hmp.” is large, white, and centered near the bottom. The character’s cloak has a flowing, wing-like shape with darker shading along the edges.  

Visible Text:  
hmp.  

Practical Summary:  
The image shows an animated character standing between a brown door-like background and a yellow-orange couch. Large white text reading “hmp.” appears at the bottom of the screen.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
